sections.label: Verse 1
lines: With all my heart,
I raise my voice
To tell of wonders, to rejoice
Each marvel that Your hands have made
Your wisdom's depth, Your plans displayed

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: When darkness falls, my foes retreat
Before Your throne, they face defeat
Their names like whispers fade away
While truth and justice hold their sway

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You reign forever on Your throne
Your judgments make Your wisdom known
A shelter for the weak to hide
A fortress where the poor reside

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Those seeking You will find Your grace
Your love surrounds this sacred space
You never turn away the lost
Who call Your name at any cost

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let nations tremble, let them know
That they are mortal here below
While You, eternal, guide our way
Through endless night to endless day

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: For You remember every tear
Each cry for justice You will hear
The hope of ages yet to come
In You, our refuge, we are one
